name: Guard The Baby 1
description: Game instructions: - Click on the enemy to defeat it when it attacks. - Press the left or right button or the A and D keys to control the character to move and collect fruits. Guard The Baby is an online game that both fun and tests the players agility and logical reasoning. In the game, you take on the role of a hungry boy who is trying to eat all the fruits falling from above. In addition, players must also eliminate all the animals attacking the boy. Players will have to multitask: eating as many fruits as possible while fending off the attacking creatures. This game not only provides entertainment but also helps to improve reflexes an
